{{Quote|The Trade Federation Gunboat has been designed to explore and conquer the dense swamps of Naboo. The vehicle's powerful engines propel it through the dangerous waterways, while the twin laser cannons and rotating turret destroy any opposition. The boat's thick armor protects it from underwater obstacles and enemy fire.|[[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Quarsh Panaka/Legends|Quarsh Panaka]]|<ref name="Star Wars: Episode I: Battle for Naboo">''[[Star Wars: Episode I: Battle for Naboo]]''</ref>}}
The '''''Ostracoda''-class gunboat''' was a sea-going vessel used by the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] to explore swamps, rivers, and other waterways. It was based upon the [[Armored Assault Tank/Legends|AAT-1]].

==Characteristics==
[[File:Water_AAT.jpg|thumb|left|180px|Gunboats deployed on [[Maramere]].]]

The gunboat boasted a rotating anti-aircraft [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser]] turret and two twin [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannons]], as well as an energy bomb launcher. It could glide over waterways like the AAT did on land.

==History==
In [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], the Trade Federation deployed these vehicles during their [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|invasion of Naboo]]. During the invasion, the [[Royal Naboo Security Forces|Naboo Royal Security Force]] attempted to help the citizens in the swamp repulse the invasion and encountered these gunboats.

Later in the fighting, at least one gunboat was captured by NRSF [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Gavyn Sykes/Legends|Gavyn Sykes]] during the crisis and was used to [[Liberation of enslavement camps|liberate]] Federation [[Slavery/Legends|enslavement]] camps, although the gunboat in question had to be abandoned at the end of the operation.

{{Veh-stub}}
